memoryArtifacts.headline:
John Royton Atwater
(1439 – 14 July 1501)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Robert Atwater, the elder, of Royton in Lenham. Will proved 22nd December, 1522, bequeaths his "sowle to Allmighty God, Our Lady Saynt Mary and all the company of Heven." 

Directs burial in the churc …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Atwater於1443年出生在英國肯特倫哈姆時，他的父親Thomas Atwater34歲，母親Eleanor Roydon30歲。他於大約1465年與Mary de Lenham在英國英格蘭肯特倫哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1501年7月14日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國肯特倫哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Atwater于1443年出生在英国肯特倫哈姆时，他的父亲Thomas Atwater34岁，母亲Eleanor Roydon30岁。他于大约1465年与Mary de Lenham在英国英格兰肯特倫哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1501年7月14日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国肯特倫哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Atwater
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone whose dwelling was by a river or lake, Middle English atte water ‘at the water’.
History: This surname was established from an early date in New England. David Atwater was one of the group of settlers who founded the New Haven colony in 1638.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Atwater was born in 1443, in Lenham, Kent, England, his father, Thomas Atwater, was 34 and his mother, Eleanor Roydon, was 30. He married Mary de Lenham about 1465, in Lenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 14 July 1501, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Lenham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Atwater est né en 1443, à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Atwater, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Roydon, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Lenham environ 1465, à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1501, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Atwater 1443 in Lenham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Atwater 34 und seine Mutter Eleanor Roydon 30. Er hat um 1465 in Lenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom Mary de Lenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juli 1501 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lenham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Atwater è nato il nel 1443 nel Lenham, Kent, England, il suo padre, Thomas Atwater, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Roydon, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Lenham circa 1465, nel Lenham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 14 luglio 1501, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Lenham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Atwaterが1443年にイギリスケントレンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Atwaterは34歳，母Eleanor Roydonは30歳であった。約1465年にイギリスイギリスケントレンハムでMary de Lenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1501年7月14日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスケントレンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Atwater(이)가 1443년 영국 켄트 렌함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Atwater(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Roydon(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 렌함에서 Mary de Lenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년 7월 14일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 렌함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Atwater nasceu em 1443, em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Atwater, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Roydon, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Lenham aproximadamente 1465, em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1501, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Atwater родился в 1443 г. в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Atwater было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Roydon, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Lenham около 1465 г. в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 14 июля 1501 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Atwater nació en 1443, en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Atwater, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Eleanor Roydon, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mary de Lenham aproximadamente 1465, en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1501, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra.
